enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his art project tracing a detailed map (including cobblestone roads), getting only three hours of sleep, taking his mom to a hospital eye checkup, eating at an Indian restaurant, and listening to the History of England podcast. He estimates the cobblestone tracing alone will take two to three weeks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: tedious but worth it for the visual payoff
exciting novelty, feels like a technology treat
